build.notes: Next.js 16 Turbopack build completed cleanly. TypeScript checks passed. 2 static routes generated (/ and /_not-found). Re-verified after step-903 CTA href fix.

test_files.description: Pricing tiers data validation — 3 tiers, billing toggle, highlight/badge, CTA labels, feature lists
6 agent types validation — distinct IDs, accent colors, names, taglines, orbit diagram geometry
StatsBanner count-up easing logic and display formatting
Navigation link targets, section IDs, HowItWorks pipeline steps
Static source analysis — section IDs in components, dark theme tokens, ARIA attributes, keyboard support, use-client boundaries, layout metadata
Watch Demo button: onClick handler, smooth scroll to #how-it-works, button type
Mobile nav focus trap: drawerRef, hamburgerRef, Tab/Shift+Tab cycling, Escape key, focus return, aria-hidden exclusion, role=dialog
Pricing CTA href targets per spec US-3: /signup, /signup?plan=pro, /contact — also verifies no '#' placeholder remains

all_required_sections_present.details: hero, features, how-it-works, and pricing sections all present with correct IDs

six_agent_types_with_distinct_styling.details: Product (#7C3AED), Architecture (#0EA5E9), Developer (#10B981), QA (#F59E0B), Security (#EF4444), DevOps (#EC4899) — all with unique accent colors in both FeaturesSection and AgentOrbitDiagram

pricing_three_tiers.details: Free ($0), Pro ($79/mo or $63/mo annual), Enterprise (Custom) — all present. Prices match canonical spec from product-spec.md.

build_without_errors.details: pnpm build succeeded with no TypeScript errors, no compilation errors

responsive_layout.details: Responsive classes confirmed in source: grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-2 lg:grid-cols-3 for features; md:grid-cols-4 for stats (2x2 on mobile); md:grid-cols-3 for pricing; lg:grid-cols-4 for how-it-works; mobile hamburger hidden md:flex for desktop nav

no_console_errors_or_missing_imports.details: TypeScript build passes cleanly. All imports resolved. No missing components. framer-motion installed but unused (no error — dead dependency).

dark_theme_consistent.details: Background #0A0B0E consistently applied. @theme tokens defined in globals.css. Dark palette used throughout all components.

navigation_links_functional.details: Anchor links (#features, #how-it-works, #pricing) all point to valid section IDs. Watch Demo scrolls to #how-it-works. Mobile focus trap implemented with Tab/Shift+Tab cycling, Escape, and focus return.

pricing_cta_hrefs.details: All three pricing CTAs have correct hrefs per spec US-3: Free → /signup, Pro → /signup?plan=pro, Enterprise → /contact. No '#' placeholders remain. 4/4 tests pass.

notes: Watch Demo fix verified: onClick handler smooth-scrolls to #how-it-works section (6/6 tests pass)
Mobile focus trap fix verified: Full implementation including Tab/Shift+Tab, Escape, wasOpenRef guard, aria-hidden exclusion (13/13 tests pass)
Pricing spec now resolved: $79/mo Pro canonical (product-spec.md). Implementation matches. Pricing amount tests pass.
RESOLVED: Pricing CTA hrefs fixed by developer (step-903). Free → /signup, Pro → /signup?plan=pro, Enterprise → /contact. 4/4 new tests pass.
Build re-verified post-fix: npm run build completes cleanly, TypeScript checks pass.
